articles.author: Kai Uyehara
articles.title: Fireball streaks across the sky in Seattle, PNW as ‘fireball season’ continues - The Seattle Times
articles.description: More than 100 people across Washington, Oregon, and British Columbia, Canada, reported the event on the American Meteor Society’s website.
articles.content:
A flash of greenish light blazed through Gerald Tracys windows early Wednesday morning, lighting up his apartment in Seattle’s First Hill neighborhood. 
It was like someone turned the overheads on, … [+1985 chars]
